recommendations.title: Bone Tomahawk
recommendations.overview: During a shootout in a saloon, Sheriff Hunt injures a suspicious stranger. The doctor's assistant, wife of the local foreman, tends to him in prison. That night, the town is attacked and they both disappear—only the arrow of a cannibal tribe is found

recommendations.title: The Clan of the Cave Bear
recommendations.overview: Natural changes have the clans moving. Iza, medicine woman of the "Clan of the Cave Bear" finds little Ayla from the "others"' clan - tradition would have the clan kill Ayla immediately, but Iza insists on keeping her. When the little one finds a mos

recommendations.title: The Mist
recommendations.overview: After a violent storm, a dense cloud of mist envelops a small Maine town, trapping David Drayton and his five-year-old son in a local grocery store with other local residents. They soon discover that the mist conceals deadly horrors that threaten the

recommendations.title: The Demented
recommendations.overview: Six college friends unite for a weekend getaway where they find themselves fighting for their lives after a terrorist attack turns the local residents into rage infused zombies.

recommendations.title: Two Thousand Maniacs!
recommendations.overview: Six people are lured into a small Deep South town for a Centennial celebration where the residents kill them one by one as revenge for the town's destruction during the Civil War.

recommendations.title: Cop Land
recommendations.overview: Freddy Heflin is the sheriff of a place everyone calls “Cop Land” — a small and seemingly peaceful town populated by the big city police officers he’s long admired. Yet something ugly is taking place behind the town’s peaceful facade. And when Freddy

recommendations.title: The Accursed
recommendations.overview: Hana spends twenty years suppressing a maleficent curse that was placed upon her bloodline, only to have a family member knowingly release it forcing her to kill or to be killed.

recommendations.title: Population 436
recommendations.overview: A census-taker is sent to investigate why a certain small town has had the same population -- 436 residents -- for the last 100 years.

recommendations.title: The Platform
recommendations.overview: A slab of food descends down a vertical facility. The residents above eat heartily, leaving those below starving and desperate. A rebellion is imminent.

recommendations.title: Dead & Breakfast
